---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new capability or enhancement
title: "[feat]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear, concise description of the proposed feature.

## Problem Statement

What problem does this solve? Who is affected?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the desired outcome at a high level.

## Scope

- **Affected areas:** (e.g. `apps/`, `services/`, `packages/`)
- **Out of scope:** 

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches evaluated and why they were not chosen.

## Additional Context

Links to ADRs, designs, or related issues.
